title: Stenn Glidrick
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Stenn Glidrick |homeworld= |birth= |death=c. [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]–[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], ''[[Kuari Princess]]''[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] was set during the time period following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' confirms that Glidrick was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|hijacking]] of the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] {{C|graying}} |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] *[[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Captain Glidrick, you wanted to see me?|Celia Durasha|}} '''Stenn Glidrick''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who commanded the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Lieutenant Durasha, sit down! Your father sent word through me, because he knew what your reaction would be. It's about your brother —''"
"''What?''"
"''He's been killed. I'm sorry.''"
"''Captain, I have three brothers. Which one —''"
"''It's Raine. Your father said there are more details on this holo that accompanied the message I received. Take all the time you need, Celia. I'm truly sorry.|Stenn Glidrick and Celia Durasha|}} Stenn Glidrick was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. After leaving the service, he became the commanding officer of [[Galaxy Tours/Legends|Galaxy Tours]] [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Glidrick had to deliver the news to his [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Celia Durasha]], that her brother, [[Raine Durasha|Raine]], had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|battle]] with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. Glidrick was in command of the ''Kuari Princess'' during the voyage in which the vessel was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|hijacked]] by the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. He was killed in the assault.{{CSWECite|I|345|Glidrick, Stenn}} ==Personality and traits== Stenn Glidrick was middle-aged, with [[Color/Legends|brown]] hair which was graying. He wore the ''Kuari Princess'' uniform, which was a white tunic and blue trousers with a gold stripe down either leg. Glidrick wore medals on his tunic, a reminder of his service within the Imperial Navy. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} *[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Stenn Glidrick }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Glidrick, Stenn}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Kuari Princess crewmembers]] [[Category:Males]]
